title: lophiolepis boujartii subsp. wettsteinii
intro: Lophiolepis boujartii subsp. wettsteinii, also known as the wettstein's scale tree or wettstein's tree fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lophiolepis boujartii subsp. wettsteinii include its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, as well as its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the fronds and leaves to make tea, or using the plant in infusions and decoctions for medicinal purposes.
